title: Optimized Portfolio Construction
outcome: Portfolio rebalanced: REMOVED (DGNX, FUFU, EMQQ, FR, STAG, AEE, CMS, FITB, INTR, ARM, CRDO, OKLO); REDUCED allocation to IIPR (from 0.037 to 0.02), and REIT cluster trimmed to limit correlation; ADDED RBRK (0.035, replaces high-beta tech/spec plays), JXI (0.028—low-volatility global utilities ETF), HUBG (0.017—high quality, low debt-to-equity industrial), ABM (0.015—defensive services), and SHYF (0.012—low leverage industrial growth). Allocations for PLTR (+0.01) and JPM (+0.005) increased on conviction. Portfolio now: maintains strong momentum/quality anchors (APP, AVGO, NVDA, BSX, PLTR, JPM), ETF/barbell exposures in place, lower average beta, correlation diversification boosted, and high-stress-drawdown tickers removed. New allocations detailed in working portfolio dict for analytics next.
